articles.title: High school baseball: Monday’s 4A bracket play roundup, Desert Hills, Bear River, Snow Canyon snag victories
articles.excerpt: Bear River and Timpanogos met in 4A bracket play, with the Deseret News roundup recapping the Bears’ 9-5 win over the Timberwolves.

articles.title: Band of brothers: Timpanogos powers past Provo, 6-2
articles.excerpt: The Timberwolves lean on their “Brothers” culture, Cooper Hawkes’ breakout season, and Canyon Clegg on the mound in a Region 8 win over Provo.

articles.title: High school baseball: 2026 4A team-by-team region capsules, predictions
articles.excerpt: The Deseret News 4A preview tabs Timpanogos as a Region 8 favorite and highlights returning contributors for the Timberwolves.

articles.title: 4A Baseball: Everyone gets into the act in Timpanogos’ 18-0 win over Pine View
articles.excerpt: The toughest thing for Timpanogos baseball Coach Kim Nelson to figure out during his team’s 18-0 romp over Pine View on Friday was a task he more than welcomed. Due to the course of the game, along with it being the final game that will be played on Timpanogos home field this sea

articles.title: Timpanogos coach Kim Nelson named 2022-23 National Baseball Coach of the Year
articles.excerpt: Kim Nelson was named the NFHS National Coach of the Year — the only Utah coach honored nationally in 2022-23.

articles.title: Coach of a lifetime: Timpanogos' Kim Nelson named 2023 NFHS baseball coach of the year
articles.excerpt: Kim Nelson was named the 2023 NFHS National Coach of the Year after eight state championships at Timpanogos.

articles.title: Fundamentals and family earn Timpanogos baseball a 5A state championship win over Lehi
articles.excerpt: Chase Riggs’ complete game and a defense full of highlight plays sealed the Timberwolves’ seventh state title.

articles.title: 5A baseball: Lehi forces Game 3, but Timpanogos rolls to another state title
articles.excerpt: The Timberwolves closed out their seventh state championship with a decisive win in the 5A title series finale.

articles.title: 5A baseball: Timpanogos squashes Lehi's momentum to take Game 1 win
articles.excerpt: Billy Bird and Brighton Tate helped the Timberwolves take Game 1 of the 5A championship series against Lehi at UCCU Ballpark.

articles.title: High school baseball: Timpanogos, Salem Hills, Lehi, Woods Cross snag wins in Monday bracket play of 5A state tournament
articles.excerpt: Timpanogos opened 5A bracket play with a 13-4 win over Orem, using a quick start and a deep lineup to stay on the winning side.

articles.title: Last Chance comeback: Timpanogos wins 6 games in 4 days to clinch 5A tourney title
articles.excerpt: Facing elimination, Timpanogos ran off six wins in four days to capture the 5A tournament championship.

articles.title: 4A baseball: Hamilton homer helps Timpanogos down Spanish Fork, repeat as state champs
articles.excerpt: Casey Hamilton’s fifth-inning home run helped Timpanogos beat Spanish Fork 9-7 and repeat as Class 4A state champions.

articles.title: Prep baseball: Cornish provides dominant presence at plate, on mound for Timpanogos
articles.excerpt: The Salt Lake Tribune spotlighted TC Cornish’s all-around impact for a rolling Timpanogos team during the 2017 season.

articles.title: Prep baseball: Timpanogos beats Orem for Class 4A state title
articles.excerpt: Timpanogos avenged Orem with 9-6 and 11-1 victories to claim the Class 4A state championship at UVU.
